title: "find-my-way" is suspicious — very new with low adoption
rule: Be cautious with "find-my-way" (npm) — it was published very recently and has very low download counts. Verify this is the intended package before shipping it to production.

title: "semver" is suspicious — very new with low adoption
rule: Be cautious with "semver" (npm) — it was published very recently and has very low download counts. Verify this is the intended package before shipping it to production.

title: "node-forge" is suspicious — very new with low adoption
rule: Be cautious with "node-forge" (npm) — it was published very recently and has very low download counts. Verify this is the intended package before shipping it to production.

title: Never use eval() or exec() for dynamic code
rule: NEVER use eval() or exec() to execute dynamic strings as code — it enables remote code execution. Use JSON.parse() for data, fixed subprocess argument lists for shell commands.
